2026
What should my lab bench setup actually look like? The optimized lab bench
AI-enabled and native workspace. Maximize Aesthetics, video pipetting for review, clean workspace, labelling, benching lab notebook, let AI do work in the nights for you, visualised experiments, figures on display (what do I want to see shown, what is the question I need answered)
